name: QA 1577
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1577

Exercise the BPF PMDA CO-RE fsslower module - install, remove and values.



Copyright (c) 2022 Sohaib Mohamed.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404-container reproduce
